This '''[[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]]''' was the fifth [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the [[House of Adasca]] and [[Parent/Legends|father]] to [[Argaloh Adasca]]. The head of [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]] three generations before the [[Mandalorian Wars]], their reign resulted in much wealth and advancement. The Arkanian's great-grandson [[Arkoh Adasca]] was said to be their spitting image.

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] {{1stm}}
